$comment: User-level Claude Code settings, carried onto every Machine by customcode from this claude home repo. This file is the BASE of the merge: every key you set here survives, EXCEPT the keys marked DO NOT TOUCH below, which customcode force-overrides at every sync.
$comment-statusLine: DO NOT TOUCH OR RELY ON THIS KEY — IT WILL BE OVERLAID BY CUSTOMCODE. Claude Code allows exactly one statusLine command and hands it the live rate-limit/context numbers; customcode must own that slot or its Telemetry goes dark. The value below only documents what customcode enforces. To restyle your visible line, ship a 'statusline-render' file at the top of claude/ instead — customcode reports Telemetry first, then execs your renderer for the line.
$comment-tui: DO NOT TOUCH THIS KEY EITHER — ALSO OVERLAID BY CUSTOMCODE. Pinned to the main-screen renderer because customcode's browser terminal owns the scrollback; 'fullscreen' would break wheel scrolling in the viewer.
